# REALITY

> REALITY is a bar, cafe, and community space at 86 Mai Thúc Lân, Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam. Coffee by day, cocktails by night, and community events nearly every day — live music, open mics, art shows, language exchanges, game nights, film screenings, and DJ sets. Its stated mission: to be the easiest place in Đà Nẵng to make friends, a platform for community, and a bridge between locals and foreigners. Open daily 11:00–02:00.

Key facts:

- Address: 86 Mai Thúc Lân, Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam (Mỹ An area, near My Khe beach)
- Hours: open daily, 11:00 AM – 2:00 AM
- Languages: English and Vietnamese (fully bilingual venue and website)
- Space: three floors — ground-floor cafe/lounge, second-floor event space and lounge, third-floor rooftop patio
- Good for: meeting people, remote work during the day, community events, private event rental, art exhibitions
- Contact: realitydn@gmail.com
- Most events are free; visitors are encouraged to buy drinks to support the space
- Anyone can propose an event or art exhibition via the website's proposal forms

## Main pages

- [Homepage (English)](https://realitydn.com/): events, info, drinks menu, visit details
- [Trang chủ (Tiếng Việt)](https://realitydn.com/vn): bản tiếng Việt đầy đủ
- [Event & Branding Guidelines](https://realitydn.com/event-guidelines): rules for hosting public, private, and art events at REALITY
- [Drinks menu (PDF)](https://realitydn.com/menu-drinks-en.pdf): full cocktail, spirits, beer, coffee, and tea menu with prices in VND

## Events

- Live weekly calendar is embedded on the homepage (Google Calendar)
- Recurring formats include open mics, pub quiz, chess club, language exchanges, film club, board game nights, dance, and DJ nights
- To host an event: use the proposal form on the homepage under Info & Hosting, or read the Event Guidelines first

## Social & community

- [WhatsApp community](https://chat.whatsapp.com/KxJVFwOv89A22qSLfO98nO): main channel for event updates
- [Instagram @reality.dn](https://www.instagram.com/reality.dn/)
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/realitybarcafedanang/)
- [Google Maps](https://maps.google.com/?cid=9044780155655225419)
